pr.title: 1.1085 BPB: JEPA + AdamW TTT + Full GPTQ + FA3 + LZMA

output.summary: Uses JEPA regularizer, pre-quantization AdamW TTT, Hessian GPTQ, FA3, XSA on every layer, and LZMA to stay under 16MB.
techniques: JEPA latent forecasting loss across horizons as representation regularizer
AdamW test-time training with cosine decay applied before quantization on EMA weights
Hessian-aware GPTQ int6 + FA3 speedup and LZMA compression to meet budget
